message:
fix(web): Resolve TypeScript test and component issues

Fix test assertions and component rendering issues in the web package.
Simplify DotPlotOverlay, improve keyboard manager tests, and fix
ScrollProvider dependencies.

- Fix DotPlotOverlay.tsx component logic
- Update KeyboardManager test assertions
- Simplify validateConflicts test setup
- Fix ScrollProvider dependency handling
